assertions.assertion: The method creates a scoped service provider via IServiceScopeFactory.CreateScope() or app.ApplicationServices equivalent
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core pattern for creating service scopes.

assertions.assertion: Database.Migrate() is called on both PersistedGrantDbContext and ConfigurationDbContext
assertions.rationale: Well-known EF Core migration pattern with IdentityServer contexts.

assertions.assertion: Before seeding clients, a check is performed (e.g. !configContext.Clients.Any()) to avoid duplicate data
assertions.rationale: Standard seeding best practice to check for existing data.

assertions.assertion: Client entities are added using the .ToEntity() extension method to convert from the IdentityServer model to the EF entity
assertions.rationale: The .ToEntity() extension method is Duende/IdentityServer4-specific and might be missed without docs.
